Frequently asked questions
What is Reclaim.ai?
Reclaim.ai is the AI calendar assistant that helps organizations move from reactive scheduling to proactive time optimization. It intelligently protects focus time, improves meeting quality, and aligns calendars to strategic priorities — while giving leaders visibility into how time is actually spent.
Unlike basic scheduling tools or passive analytics dashboards, Reclaim connects insight to action. Its AI surfaces recommendations, enables safe preview and approval of changes, and automates policy enforcement at scale. Ideal for growing teams and enterprises seeking higher performance without burnout, Reclaim transforms time from a hidden cost into a measurable advantage.
Does Reclaim.ai work with Google Calendar and Outlook Calendar?
Yes – Reclaim runs on your Google Calendar or Outlook Calendar account, automatically scheduling your AI-powered meetings, focus time, tasks, and habits around your existing events. You can even sync multiple calendars across
Google and Outlook
to prevent conflicts and protect personal commitments on your work schedule.
Is Reclaim for individuals or enterprise teams?
Reclaim is built for everyone — from individuals to company-wide
enterprise deployments
.
Many of our largest company rollouts began with a single user who improved their own productivity, inspired their team, and caught leadership’s attention. Reclaim scales naturally from personal AI scheduling automation to organization-wide AI calendar management.
Here's how Reclaim works for individuals and across organizations:
Individuals:
Automatically schedule tasks, habits, and
Focus Time
to stay focused and adaptable. Optimize meetings to reduce conflicts, fragmentation, and interruptions while gaining insights into how your time is spent.
Managers:
Protect team focus time, balance meeting load, and gain visibility into workloads and priorities, and ensure important work has time allocated across the team.
Companies & enterprise leaders:
Automate focus and meeting policies across the org,
measure time allocation
and meeting hygiene through executive dashboards, and use secure, privacy-first insights to drive measurable productivity and efficiency at scale.
How does Reclaim.ai’s AI scheduling work?
Reclaim’s AI scheduling assistant intelligently optimizes your calendar around your priorities, workload, meetings, and focus time — helping you make better use of your week without constant manual planning.
The assistant continuously analyzes your availability, surfaces recommendations and trade-offs, and helps rebalance your schedule as priorities shift. You can interact with it conversationally to optimize your week, resolve conflicts, protect focus time, or adjust meetings — with preview and approval controls before changes are applied.
As your schedule changes throughout the week, Reclaim dynamically adapts meetings, tasks, and focus time to reduce overload, resolve conflicts, and protect important work.
What productivity results can I expect with Reclaim.ai?
Across all users

Free features
5 AI Agents
i
Create specialized agents to continuously optimize your schedule across Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meeting, and Meeting Quality agents.
Focus Time
i
Set a weekly Focus Time goal, and automatically defend time to get stuff done around your existing calendar events.
Habits
i
AI-powered recurring events that automatically find the best time within your smart schedule windows.
Buffer Time
i
Defend breaks automatically after video call events so you have time to reset & prepare for your next meeting.
Smart Meetings
i
Convert your recurring meetings to Smart Meetings in one click to automatically monitor, prioritize, and resolve scheduling conflicts across your meetings.
Meeting Quality
i
Flag invites that still need your response and nudge you to accept, decline, or propose a new time—so organizers can plan and your calendar stays accurate.
Plus:
1 user team

Future time range for automated scheduling optimizations.
1 Calendar Sync
i
Sync & copy events between calendars to defend your availability across multiple schedules.
1 Scheduling Link
i
Share your availability for meetings with Scheduling Links that offer smart priority settings to book the right meetings sooner.
Limited integrations
i
Get Google Tasks, Slack, Zoom, and Google Meet support in the free Lite plan, and unlimited support for these plus Todoist, Asana, ClickUp, Jira, and Linear in all paid plans.
Task recommendations
i
Automatically generate recommended tasks through action items from your meetings so you don't fall behind on deliverables and opportunities between meetings.

Reclaim.ai Help Center
Search for articles...
Get started with Reclaim
New to Reclaim? Start here to learn about what Reclaim is as well as how it works.
19 articles
Switching from Clockwise
Clockwise is recommending Reclaim. Learn more about switching.
2 articles
Focus Time
How to defend more time for focus during the workweek.
4 articles
Habits
How to use Habits to set up flexible routines on your calendar.
5 articles
Tasks
How to use Tasks to automatically block time on the calendar to get work done.
9 articles
Calendar Sync
How to use Calendar Sync to block events across multiple calendars.
15 articles
Scheduling Links
How to create and share Scheduling Links to book your meetings.
14 articles
Smart Meetings
How to use Smart Meetings to automate your recurring meetings.
8 articles
Buffers, Settings, and Color-Coding
How to customize your Reclaim settings, enable buffers between meetings, and color-code your calendar using Reclaim.
19 articles
Task integrations
How to sync tasks from Todoist, Asana, ClickUp, Linear, Jira, & Google Tasks.
17 articles
Planner
How to use Reclaim's Planner feature to prioritize your workweek.
2 articles
Stats
How to use Reclaim to analyze your time and your team's time.
4 articles
Videoconferencing & chat integrations
How to integrate Reclaim with Zoom and Slack to better communicate your availability.
7 articles
Add-ons & extensions
Learn how to use Reclaim on your mobile or desktop device, as well as our Google Calendar Add-on and Raycast extension.
10 articles
Account and Team Administration
How to manage your team and account settings in Reclaim.
23 articles
Billing
Learn about plans, pricing, billing, and discounts.
15 articles
Security and Compliance
More information about Reclaim's privacy and security certifications and policies.
8 articles
Beta features
Learn more about beta features and what we're working on at Reclaim.
16 articles
Support and Troubleshooting
How to contact our support team and get help with common questions.
6 articles
Learning Labs
Exercises & labs to get you familiar with Reclaim features
8 articles
#1 AI calendar for work.

hits.title: Show HN: Reclaim – an adaptive calendar app that plans time for your routines
Show HN: Reclaim Tasks – automatic task scheduling on your calendar
Questions to ask in a calendar time audit
Show HN: Reclaim – an adaptive calendar app that plans time for your routines
Task Management Trends Managers vs. Individual Contributors Statistics
Do you also struggle with procrastination?

analysis.name: Reclaim.ai
analysis.value_proposition: AI agents that automatically schedule work, meetings, and life on your calendar to defend focus time and optimize your workweek.
analysis.ideal_customer: Knowledge workers and teams (marketing, sales, engineering, product, finance, HR, EAs) on Google Calendar or Outlook who need to defend focus time and coordinate scheduling across meetings and tasks

features.name: ai focus time
features.description: Set a weekly Focus Time goal and let AI auto-defend time on the calendar to get deep work done.
features.evidence_quote: Set a Focus Time goal, and let AI defend time to get stuff done.

features.name: ai habits
features.description: AI-powered recurring events that automatically find the best time within smart schedule windows.
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered recurring events that automatically find the best time within your smart schedule windows.

features.name: ai tasks
features.description: Flexibly auto-schedule tasks around meetings on your calendar.
features.evidence_quote: Flexibly schedule your tasks in your calendar.

features.name: ai smart meetings
features.description: Convert recurring meetings to Smart Meetings that monitor, prioritize, and resolve scheduling conflicts.
features.evidence_quote: Convert your recurring meetings to Smart Meetings in one click to automatically monitor, prioritize, and resolve scheduling conflicts

features.name: ai scheduling links
features.description: Share availability using smart meeting controls to book meetings.
features.evidence_quote: Share your availability using smart meeting controls.

features.name: ai buffer time
features.description: Auto-schedule breaks and travel across meetings and work sessions.
features.evidence_quote: Auto-schedule breaks & travel across your meetings & work sessions.

features.name: ai calendar sync
features.description: Automatically defend time for events across all of your schedules/calendars.
features.evidence_quote: Automatically defend time for events across all of your schedules.

features.name: ai planner
features.description: Automate the perfect daily plan and manage smart events.
features.evidence_quote: Automate the perfect daily plan & manage your smart events.

features.name: ai time tracking
features.description: Analyze time across meetings, tasks, and work-life balance metrics.
features.evidence_quote: Analyze your time across meetings, tasks, & work-life balance metrics.

features.name: ai assistant
features.description: Chat with an AI assistant to plan, prioritize, and optimize your schedule.
features.evidence_quote: Chat with your AI Assistant to plan, prioritize, and optimize your schedule.

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Specialized AI agents that continuously optimize your schedule across focus, habits, buffers, meetings, and quality.
features.evidence_quote: 5 AI Agents ... Create specialized agents to continuously optimize your schedule

features.name: meeting quality agent
features.description: Flags invites needing a response and nudges you to accept, decline, or propose new time.
features.evidence_quote: Flag invites that still need your response and nudge you to accept, decline, or propose a new time

features.name: team ooo calendar
features.description: Automatic team out-of-office visibility across the org.
features.evidence_quote: Make out-of-office visibility automatic.

features.name: workforce analytics
features.description: See how teams spend their time across meetings, tasks, and focus work.
features.evidence_quote: See how teams spend their time.

features.name: people analytics
features.description: Analytics on team-wide time usage and work-life balance metrics.
features.evidence_quote: People Analytics

features.name: working hours
features.description: Configure working hours that gate scheduling decisions.
features.evidence_quote: Working Hours

features.name: color-coding
features.description: Color-code your calendar using Reclaim's event categories.
features.evidence_quote: color-code your calendar using Reclaim

features.name: capacity planning
features.description: Defend focus time for teams and improve capacity planning.
features.evidence_quote: Defend focus time for your team & improve capacity planning.

features.name: sprint planning
features.description: Improve engineering sprint planning and defend more focus time for the team.
features.evidence_quote: Improve sprint planning & defend more focus time for your team.

features.name: no-meeting day
features.description: Enable dedicated focus days with no meetings for the team.
features.evidence_quote: No Meeting Day Initiative ... Enable dedicated focus days.

features.name: meeting agenda initiative
features.description: Enterprise initiative to run more effective meetings via agenda enforcement.
features.evidence_quote: Meeting Agenda Initiative ... Run more effective meetings.

features.name: slack notifications initiative
features.description: Prevent unnecessary interruptions from Slack via managed notifications.
features.evidence_quote: Slack Notifications Initiative ... Prevent unnecessary interruptions.

features.name: calendar fragmentation initiative
features.description: Reduce lost time across the workday from fragmented meeting blocks.
features.evidence_quote: Calendar Fragmentation Initiative ... Reduce lost time across the workday.

features.name: google calendar integration
features.description: AI scheduling for existing Google Calendar; free add-on available.
features.evidence_quote: Google Calendar ... AI scheduling for your existing Google Calendar.

features.name: outlook calendar integration
features.description: AI scheduling for existing Outlook Calendar.
features.evidence_quote: Outlook Calendar ... AI scheduling for your existing Outlook Calendar.

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Manage calendar from Slack; sync Slack status with calendar events.
features.evidence_quote: Slack ... Manage your calendar from Slack.

features.name: zoom integration
features.description: Automatically sync Zoom meetings with Reclaim.
features.evidence_quote: Zoom ... Automatically sync Zoom meetings with Reclaim.

features.name: jira integration
features.description: Automatically schedule Jira work on the calendar.
features.evidence_quote: Jira Software ... Automatically schedule Jira work on your calendar.

features.name: asana integration
features.description: Turn Asana tasks into protected calendar time.
features.evidence_quote: Asana ... Turn Asana tasks into protected calendar time.

features.name: google tasks integration
features.description: Automatically schedule Google Tasks on the calendar.
features.evidence_quote: Google Tasks ... Automatically schedule Google Tasks on your calendar.

features.name: todoist integration
features.description: Plan Todoist tasks around meetings and priorities.
features.evidence_quote: Todoist ... Plan Todoist tasks around meetings and priorities.

features.name: clickup integration
features.description: Turn ClickUp work into time on the calendar.
features.evidence_quote: ClickUp ... Turn ClickUp work into time on your calendar.

features.name: linear integration
features.description: Schedule Linear issues alongside meetings.
features.evidence_quote: Linear ... Schedule Linear issues alongside your meetings.

features.name: raycast integration
features.description: Manage schedule directly from Raycast.
features.evidence_quote: Raycast ... Manage your schedule directly from Raycast.

features.name: claude mcp integration
features.description: Manage calendar from Claude via MCP.
features.evidence_quote: Claude ... Manage your calendar from Claude via MCP.

features.name: chatgpt integration
features.description: Manage calendar from ChatGPT.
features.evidence_quote: ChatGPT ... Manage your calendar from ChatGPT.

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Connect Reclaim workflows to third-party tools via webhooks.
features.evidence_quote: Webhooks ... Connect Reclaim workflows to your favorite tools.

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Mobile add-ons for iOS/Android to use Reclaim on the go.
features.evidence_quote: Learn how to use Reclaim on your mobile or desktop device

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Desktop client for Reclaim.
features.evidence_quote: Learn how to use Reclaim on your mobile or desktop device

features.name: google calendar add-on
features.description: Free Google Calendar add-on for lightweight Reclaim usage.
features.evidence_quote: Get the free Google Calendar add-on

features.name: team administration
features.description: Team and account administration controls for admins.
features.evidence_quote: Account and Team Administration ... How to manage your team and account settings

features.name: pomodoro timer
features.description: Free standalone Pomodoro timer tool for focus.
features.evidence_quote: Boost your focus and productivity with the free Pomodoro Timer.

features.name: meeting cost calculator
features.description: Free tool that calculates the cost of meetings.
features.evidence_quote: Meeting Cost Calculator

features.name: ai agent library
features.description: Library of prebuilt AI agents users can add to their calendar workflows.
features.evidence_quote: AI Agent Library

features.name: no ai training on user data
features.description: Reclaim commits to not training AI models on user data.
features.evidence_quote: We don't train AI on your data

features.name: security and compliance
features.description: Privacy and security certifications and policies documented in help center.
features.evidence_quote: Security and Compliance ... privacy and security certifications and policies

differentiators: #1 AI calendar for work — specialized AI agents that continuously optimize scheduling
AI defends Focus Time automatically against real calendar conflicts
Deep two-way task integrations with Asana, Jira, ClickUp, Linear, Todoist, Google Tasks
Does not train AI on user data
100% free plan with no credit card required
Enterprise Initiatives package (Focus Time, No-Meeting Day, Meeting Agenda, Slack Notifications, Calendar Fragmentation, Buffer Time, Team OOO)

recent_ships.what: Claude MCP integration — manage calendar from Claude
recent_ships.source: Integrations page: 'Claude ... Manage your calendar from Claude via MCP.'

recent_ships.what: ChatGPT integration — manage calendar from ChatGPT
recent_ships.source: Integrations page: 'ChatGPT ... Manage your calendar from ChatGPT.'

recent_ships.what: AI Agents framework with 5 specialized agents (Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meeting, Meeting Quality)
recent_ships.source: Pricing page: '5 AI Agents ... Create specialized agents to continuously optimize your schedule'

recent_ships.what: Meeting Quality agent — flags unresponded invites and nudges accept/decline/propose
recent_ships.source: Pricing page: 'Flag invites that still need your response and nudge you to accept, decline, or propose a new time'

recent_ships.what: AI Assistant chat interface for schedule planning
recent_ships.source: Landing page: 'Chat with your AI Assistant to plan, prioritize, and optimize your schedule.'

recent_ships.what: Workforce Analytics for team time visibility
recent_ships.source: Landing page: 'See how teams spend their time.'

praised: Adaptive scheduling that plans time for routines (HN Show HN, 106↑)
Automatic task scheduling on calendar (HN Show HN Tasks, 10↑)
4.8 stars on G2 (per landing page claim)
complaints: Acquisition anxiety after Dropbox Acquires Reclaim.ai (HN 32↑ 24c) — users questioning product direction post-acquisition
Users on HN asking for AI Calendar recommendations suggest ongoing discovery friction / awareness gap

free_tier.limits: 1 user team; 5 AI Agents; Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meetings, Meeting Quality; calendar basics

tiers.name: Lite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free forever: 5 AI Agents, Focus Time, Habits, Buffer Time, Smart Meetings, Meeting Quality; 1 user team

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: Longer scheduling ranges and more events for solo users; 30% off promo for new users

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Team-wide controls, unlimited access; 14-day free trial; 30% off promo for new users

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Contact sales; Workforce Analytics, initiatives, team-wide governance

pricing.notes: Yearly billing saves 20%; limited-time 30% off Starter & Business for new users; Lite is free forever with no credit card; 14-day free trial of Business auto-rolls into Lite; discounts available for students, nonprofits, startups, and competitor switchers; exact Starter/Business seat prices were truncated from the pricing page snapshot.
